Changes:
- OCCTWrapper.so moved to lib/ instead of bin and added to pkg-list
- 90-3dconnexion.rules is prevented from installation - FreeBD doesn't support 
  udev machinery
- share/icons/hicolor/* are add in pkg-plist. Seems, they are needed for
  some desktop enviroment
